description: You are a scientific programmer for a university aerospace research team. Fix the byte-level unpacking errors in the Python telemetry parser located at /home/ga/workspace/telemetry_decoder/ to resolve data corruption issues. Using the 'Hardware_ICD_Spec.md' as a reference, correct the five binary parsing bugs in 'parser.py' related to checksum validation, endianness, C-struct padding, data types, and bitwise masking. The final script must successfully process 'PSAS_Launch2_Flight.tlm' to generate 'flight_trajectory.csv'. Commit the completed fixes to the Git repository.
